chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3449 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 8111/2019 2. For hearing of main case 03.02.2025 Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Hyder Ali Khan, advocate for respondent Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate for respondent Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Per learned counsel, show cause notice has been impugned herein which shall be responded to by the petitioner before the issuing authority, it is stated that it may be just and proper for the said notice to be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner, and subject to the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard. Petition is disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Amjad
